title: scutellaria novae-zelandiae
intro: Scutellaria novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand skullcap, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria novae-zelandiae include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Scutellaria novae-zelandiae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
